name: Legendary Six Samurai - Kizan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－キザン
desc: If you control a "Six Samurai" monster with a different name, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). While you control 2 or more other "Six Samurai" monsters, this card gains 300 ATK/DEF.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Six Samurai" monster with a different name, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). While you control 2 or more other "Six Samurai" monsters, this card gains 300 ATK/DEF.
eff: If you control a "Six Samurai" monster with a different name, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). While you control 2 or more other "Six Samurai" monsters, this card gains 300 ATK/DEF.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
